The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 1.action: Kyon grows up rejecting the possibility of aliens, time travelers, ghosts, monsters, and espers as fiction
On the first day of high school, class 1-5 members introduce themselves
Kyon is struck by the girl seated behind him, Haruhi Suzumiya
Haruhi introduces herself by saying she is not interested in normal humans, only aliens, time travelers, and espers
Kyon hopes to pursue Haruhi romantically
Kyon strikes up a conversation with Haruhi between classes
Haruhi proves highly antisocial and bluntly dismisses Kyon
Kyon remains intrigued by Haruhi
Kyon and Kunikida press Taniguchi for more information about Haruhi
Taniguchi warns Kyon and Kunikida against courting Haruhi
Taniguchi describes Haruhi as smart, beautiful, athletic, eccentric, and unattainable
Taniguchi recounts Haruhi sneaking onto school grounds and drawing bizarre symbols three years ago
Taniguchi says Haruhi dated and dumped every boy who asked her out within a week
Kyon observes Haruhi closely during the first weeks of school
Kyon notices the pattern with which Haruhi changes her hairstyle daily
Kyon asks Haruhi about the reasoning for her hairstyle pattern
Haruhi responds positively to Kyon’s question
Kyon and Haruhi begin conversing before class each day
Ryoko Asakura informs Kyon he is the first to have a real conversation with Haruhi
Ryoko Asakura asks Kyon to act as a go-between for Haruhi
Kyon delicately asks Haruhi why she tried out every club at school but joined none
Haruhi explains that all the clubs failed to live up to her expectations for adventure
Kyon comments that dissatisfaction is the motive for human ingenuity, and normal humans are better off being satisfied with ordinary activities
Haruhi reflects on the first half of Kyon's comment
Haruhi concludes that she should form her own club
Haruhi enlists Kyon's assistance to form the club
Haruhi takes over the Literary Club room
Nagato is unbothered by the annexation of the club room
Kyon is wearied by Haruhi's energetic assembling of the club
Kyon continues to follow Haruhi's directions
Haruhi pulls Asahina into the clubroom and locks the door
Haruhi explains that Asahina's cuteness fulfills the club's need for a "moe" factor
Asahina is terrified by the abduction
Asahina becomes compliant when she notices Nagato, which triggers some realization
Haruhi names the club the SOS Brigade, now with four members
Kyon notes that the group still has no designated mission despite the name
The class seating arrangements are changed
Kyon is seated in front of Haruhi again
Haruhi subconsciously manipulates the seating arrangement
Kyon is asked how long he believed in Santa Claus
Kyon states he never believed in Santa Claus
Kyon recognizes the Santa at his kindergarten Christmas festival was fake
Kyon never saw his mother kissing Santa
Kyon, even as a child, knew better than to believe in Santa
Kyon realizes as he got older that aliens, time-travelers, ghosts, monsters, espers, evil syndicates, and heroes were also fake
Kyon admits he always knew those things were bogus but didn’t want to admit it
Kyon wishes for an alien, time-traveler, ghost, monster, esper, evil syndicate, or hero to appear
Kyon acknowledges reality is harsh and the laws of physics limit possibilities
Kyon stops watching TV shows about aliens and ghosts
Kyon accepts that aliens, time-travelers, and espers don’t exist, but wishes they did
Kyon grows up and learns to think about those things while accepting reality
Kyon outgrows those fantasies by the end of junior high
Kyon gets used to living in an ordinary world
Kyon enters high school
Kyon meets Haruhi
Haruhi introduces herself as Haruhi Suzumiya from East junior high
Haruhi states she is not interested in ordinary people
Haruhi invites any aliens, time-travelers, or espers to come see her
Haruhi ends her introduction
Taniguchi advises someone to forget about pursuing Haruhi
Taniguchi claims to know Haruhi well after being in the same class for three years
Taniguchi describes Haruhi as beyond eccentric
Taniguchi notes Haruhi is popular with the guys
Taniguchi observes Haruhi is attractive
Taniguchi mentions Haruhi is good at sports
Taniguchi mentions Haruhi gets good grades
Taniguchi calls Haruhi a super weirdo
Taniguchi notes Haruhi appears normal when standing quietly
Taniguchi recounts Haruhi dating several guys, with the longest relationship lasting about a week
Taniguchi recounts the shortest relationship lasted five minutes
Taniguchi observes Haruhi never turns down a guy who asks her out
Taniguchi repeats his advice to forget about pursuing Haruhi
Kyon narrates that Haruhi was acting sort of normal and he was feeling good that month
Kyon notes that Haruhi's eccentricities were starting to show
Haruhi wears a different hairstyle every day, increasing the number of tie-off points as the week progresses
Haruhi resets her hair on Monday and adds a tie-off point each day until Friday
Kyon wonders what Haruhi's hair looks like on Sunday
Haruhi changes out of her school uniform in front of boys during P.E. class, ignoring their presence
Kyon observes that Haruhi treats guys like a bag of potatoes
Haruhi joins every team and extra-curricular club at school
All the sports clubs lobby for Haruhi to join their teams
Haruhi turns down every sports club
Haruhi changes clubs daily depending on her mood
Haruhi does not remain a member of any club in the end
Kyon questions what Haruhi wants to do
Kyon introduces the name "The Spreading excitement all Over the world with Haruhi Suzumiya Brigade" and its abbreviation "SOS Brigade"
Kyon comments that it's okay to laugh at the name
Kyon reflects that the name should be "Spreading excitement all Over the world with Haruhi Suzumiya Organization"
Kyon notes they don’t have the right to form an organization yet
Kyon admits they still don’t know the point of the club

The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 2.action: Haruhi decides that the SOS Brigade needs a computer in their clubroom
Haruhi blackmails the Computer Research Society into giving her a computer and running a LAN cable between clubrooms for Internet access
Haruhi forces the Computer Research Society president's hand onto Asahina's breast and takes photos, threatening to use them as evidence of sexual harassment
Asahina is unwilling to quit the SOS Brigade despite the incident
Asahina says she is worried about Nagato's presence
Asahina flirts with Kyon, telling him to call her by her given name
Asahina asks Kyon if he would be willing to marry her if no one else would
Haruhi orders Kyon to create a website for the SOS Brigade during lunch break
Kyon creates a website for the SOS Brigade during lunch break
Nagato, who is in the clubroom during lunch, lends Kyon a book
Kyon finds himself eagerly showing up for each SOS Brigade meeting despite his objections
Haruhi produces a policy statement for the SOS Brigade, stating their goal as investigating paranormal phenomena
Haruhi forces Asahina into a bunny girl costume
Haruhi and Asahina, both in costume, hand out fliers about the SOS Brigade at the main gate
Asahina, in costume, hands out fliers about the SOS Brigade at the main gate
Teachers put a stop to the flier distribution and give the girls detention
The incident makes the SOS Brigade the talk of the school
No emails are sent to the SOS Brigade about paranormal mysteries
Haruhi expresses frustration at the lack of emails
Kyon is convinced that Haruhi is intelligent enough to realize it’s unrealistic to expect to find paranormal mysteries in this way, and that her behavior is motivated by unfocused adolescent energy
Nagato asks Kyon if he has read the book
Kyon says no
Nagato tells Kyon to read the book as soon as he gets home
Kyon arrives home and skims through the book
a bookmark falls out with a request to meet at the park across from Kouyo Station at 7 PM written on it
Kyon rides to meet Nagato
Nagato confirms she waited yesterday as well
Nagato leads Kyon to her apartment, where she lives alone
Nagato says she arranged the meeting to tell Kyon that she and Haruhi are not normal humans
Nagato reveals she is an alien created by the Data Integration Thought Entity to make contact with organic life forms

The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 3.action: Nagato explains to Kyon that the Data Integration Thought Entity has been observing humans since they developed wisdom
The Data Integration Thought Entity observes humans for their unique quality of wisdom
Three years ago, the Thought Entity witnesses an explosion of data from Haruhi that spreads over the globe
Haruhi possesses the power to manipulate reality and may be the key to humankind's auto-evolution
The Data Integration Thought Entity creates Humanoid Interfaces like Nagato to contact humans
Nagato is created as a Humanoid Interface to contact humans
The majority of the Thought Entity anticipates catastrophe if Haruhi is informed of her powers, so it continues to only observe
Nagato contacts Kyon because Haruhi chose him as her companion for an undetermined reason
Some elements of the Thought Entity wish to experiment with Haruhi's powers, potentially by harming Kyon
Kyon is skeptical of Nagato's story, believing it a delusion inspired by science fiction novels
Haruhi recruits Itsuki Koizumi, a freshman transfer student, to the SOS Brigade
Haruhi reasons that anyone who transfers during the early months of school is mysterious
Haruhi declares the Brigade's purpose is to find aliens, time travelers, and espers and have fun with them
Haruhi forces Asahina into a maid costume to increase the club's moe factor
Haruhi makes Asahina pose
Kyon takes photos of Asahina
Kyon rebukes Haruhi for her abuse of Asahina
Kyon acknowledges his complicity in Haruhi's actions
Koizumi makes no effort to curb Haruhi's behavior
Nagato makes no effort to curb Haruhi's behavior
Haruhi orders the SOS Brigade to meet on Saturday to search the city for paranormal phenomena
The group draws straws to split into groups
Kyon is paired off with Asahina
Asahina reveals to Kyon that she is a time traveler from the future assigned to monitor Haruhi
Asahina tells Kyon that she knows Nagato and Koizumi have similar roles
The group draws straws again at lunch
Kyon is paired off with Nagato
Kyon takes Nagato to a library
Kyon falls asleep in the library
Haruhi calls Kyon angrily, having waited a half hour at the meeting point
Kyon rushes Nagato out to meet with Haruhi
Kyon gets Nagato a library card because she refuses to leave without her book
Haruhi admonishes Kyon for not finding anything and says they will discuss his behavior at Monday's meeting
Kyon shows up at the clubroom early on Monday to confront Koizumi
Koizumi admits he is an esper working for a secret Agency
Koizumi says that aliens, time travelers, and espers exist only because Haruhi wishes for them to exist
Koizumi says Haruhi created the world they know three years ago
Koizumi says angering or upsetting Haruhi may cause her to make the world cease to exist
Haruhi never shows up to the meeting despite her earlier threat

The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 4.action: Haruhi is bored and depressed on Tuesday morning
Kyon prods Haruhi for why she didn't show up to the Monday SOS Brigade meeting
Haruhi reveals she reviewed the entire city search by herself instead of attending the meeting
Kyon suggests Haruhi give up searching for the supernatural, get a boyfriend, and convert the SOS Brigade into a conventional club
Haruhi dismisses love as a fleeting mental illness and insists only a supernatural occurrence can relieve her boredom
Kyon is concerned about a mysterious letter he found in his shoe locker before class
The letter directs Kyon to come to classroom 5 after everyone leaves
Kyon sees Haruhi uploading the risque maid photos he took of Asahina to the SOS Brigade website
Haruhi uploads risque maid photos of Asahina to the SOS Brigade website
Kyon convinces Haruhi to delete the photos, explaining the moral issues with posting personal photos or info
Haruhi deletes the photos from the website
Kyon secretly puts the photos in an invisible folder for his own viewing
Haruhi leaves the meeting early in a huff
Kyon goes to classroom 5, where Ryoko Asakura awaits him
Asakura, revealed to be an alien, attempts to kill Kyon to provoke a reaction from Haruhi
Nagato stops Asakura from killing Kyon
Nagato cuts off Asakura’s access to physical form due to insubordination
Nagato alters data to have Asakura transferred to a different school
Haruhi notices Asakura’s abrupt transfer, which dispels her bad mood
Kyon gets a note in his shoe locker on Wednesday morning, signed by Asahina and asking him to meet her in the clubroom
Kyon remembers the incident with Asakura and realizes the foolhardiness of trusting a note
Kyon decides to keep the meeting due to his attraction to Asahina
Kyon is confronted by an adult woman, Mikuru Asahina from farther in the future
Adult Asahina tells Kyon he will soon face a grave danger to all the world
Adult Asahina tells Kyon that Haruhi will be with him at that time
Adult Asahina tells Kyon to remember the clue "Snow White"
Haruhi investigates Asakura's transfer
Haruhi finds a suspicious lack of information about Asakura
Haruhi gets Asakura's old address
Haruhi enlists Kyon to join her investigation
Haruhi dismisses the rest of the SOS Brigade for the day
Asakura attacks Kyon
Asakura claims data jurisdiction over the classroom
Asakura fights Nagato
Nagato fights Asakura
Asakura utilizes various forms of data manipulation
Nagato utilizes various forms of data manipulation
The adult Asahina time travels from the future
Asahina informs Kyon of the star-shaped mole
Asahina accidentally creates a bootstrap paradox by sharing information she learned from Kyon

The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 5.action: Kyon and Haruhi investigate Asakura's apartment building
Haruhi and Kyon find Asakura's old apartment locked
Haruhi skillfully questions the building manager and North High administration
Haruhi learns Asakura transferred to North High from outside the local area
Haruhi learns Asakura paid for her upscale apartment up front with cash
Haruhi learns Asakura's parents were never around
Haruhi learns Asakura left no forwarding address and no movers were seen when she moved out
Haruhi learns all Asakura's things seemingly just disappeared
Haruhi and Kyon bump into Nagato upon leaving
Haruhi realizes Nagato lives in the same building as Asakura did
Haruhi tells Kyon about her epiphany in sixth grade regarding the insignificance of her existence
Haruhi becomes determined to become an extraordinary person among Earth's population
Haruhi feels she has succeeded at becoming extraordinary
Haruhi feels depressed that her life is no more interesting as a result
Kyon has no words for Haruhi
Haruhi and Kyon part ways
Haruhi abandons the investigation into Asakura
Kyon gets home
Koizumi meets Kyon and tells him that aliens, espers, and time travelers exist because Haruhi wished for them
Koizumi explains that Haruhi is capable of destroying the world and creating a new one, and may have done so many times
Koizumi expresses concern that Haruhi's mental state has become highly agitated by the formation of the SOS Brigade
Koizumi shows Kyon his ability to enter closed space
Haruhi subconsciously creates closed space when she experiences frustration
giant creatures called shinjin destroy everything around in closed space
closed space expands as destruction continues, threatening to encompass and end the world
espers like Koizumi defeat the shinjin, causing the closed space to collapse
Koizumi asks Kyon to look after Haruhi's mental state
Haruhi seems to hear Kyon's unspoken thought
Haruhi creates closed space with celestials
Koizumi and several others enter the closed space
Koizumi and several others use esper powers to defeat the celestials

The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 6.action: The 6th episode is broadcast as the 14th episode on July 2, 2006
Haruhi unknowingly brings Kyon to her new world
Kyon tells Taniguchi that he and Nagato were on the floor together after school because Nagato fainted due to chronic anemia and he caught her
Taniguchi does not believe Kyon's story
Taniguchi tells Kyon he has lost all chance of being seen as normal due to his association with Haruhi Suzumiya
Kyon and Taniguchi remain friends
Kyon indulges in the contents of his hidden "Mikuru" folder
Asahina sees Kyon has a folder with her name on it
Kyon tries to prevent Asahina from opening the folder, leading to a flirtatious struggle
Asahina struggles with Kyon over the folder
Haruhi sees Kyon wrestling with Asahina
Asahina fearfully withdraws
Haruhi announces her intention to change clothes
Kyon makes no move to leave
Haruhi is insulted and infuriated, and kicks Kyon out of the room
Kyon is kicked out of the room
The meeting calms
Kyon reflects that he is content with most days being "normal"
Haruhi is not content with most days being "normal"
Kyon and Haruhi wake up inside a small closed space encompassing only the North High grounds
Haruhi is surprised
Haruhi and Kyon confirm they cannot leave the closed space or reach the outside world by phone
Haruhi has Kyon wait while she investigates
Koizumi arrives and tells Kyon they are in the closed space because Haruhi has decided to move on to a new world, and Kyon is the only thing she wishes to retain from the old world
The espers could barely enter the closed space and presume this is an end-of-the-world crisis
Koizumi tells Kyon that Asahina said it was all her fault, and Nagato said to turn on the computer
Kyon turns on the computer
A DOS script from Nagato ends with "sleeping beauty"
A Celestial begins destroying the school
Haruhi is gripped by excitement, convinced the Celestial is not evil and that she is having the strange and wonderful experience she always wanted
Kyon tries to talk Haruhi out of her excitement on technical grounds, mentioning the lack of food and absence of people
Haruhi assures Kyon that they will have everything they need and everyone they knew before will be with them; things will only be more exciting
Kyon confesses that he likes the old world and tells Haruhi that exciting things have been happening around her, making the old world interesting enough
Kyon asks himself what Haruhi means to him
Kyon tells Haruhi how much he liked the sight of her with a ponytail and kisses her
Kyon is returned to his bed
Kyon is concerned that he may have failed to convince Haruhi, and that he and Haruhi are living in a new world as the sole survivors of the old one
Koizumi is unable to reassure Kyon
Nagato is unable to reassure Kyon
Haruhi believes the closed space incident was a nightmare
Haruhi puts her hair in a ponytail
Kyon submits the SOS Brigade's application to be an official club
Koizumi makes an excuse to not join the SOS Brigade's second citywide search
Nagato makes an excuse to not join the SOS Brigade's second citywide search
Asahina makes an excuse to not join the SOS Brigade's second citywide search
Kyon shows up an hour early so that Haruhi will be forced to pay for their meal
Kyon plans to talk to Haruhi about aliens, espers, and time travelers
Haruhi creates closed space as the building block for an alternate world
Haruhi teleports herself and Kyon from their homes into the closed space
Haruhi manifests celestials
Koizumi uses esper powers to enter the closed space and float outside the Literary clubroom's window
Nagato briefly sends data from the normal world into the closed space
Kyon informs Asahina about her mole, which he only learned about from her older self

Remote Island Syndrome Part 1.action: Keiichi Tamaru allows the SOS Brigade and his brother Yutaka Tamaru to stay at his newly built island villa
Haruhi is pleased and promotes Koizumi to vice president of the SOS Brigade
Haruhi declares her role on the trip will be "supersleuth"
Koizumi explains to Kyon that Haruhi recognizes the isolated island as a closed circle, a common feature in detective fiction
Haruhi thinks that if she enters the closed circle as a detective, she will inevitably be confronted with an interesting case
Kyon's sister stows away on the trip
SOS Brigade members happily welcome Kyon's sister, aside from Kyon
They ride a ferry to the port
Arakawa and Sonou Mori meet the group at the port
Arakawa and Sonou Mori take the group by private boat to the island
Guests are each given their own room with locking doors
Haruhi becomes increasingly frustrated at the lack of mysterious occurrences or circumstances
Haruhi alarms Kyon and Asahina by excitedly declaring that Asahina will be the first murder victim
Haruhi's powers can make such a wish reality
They have fun on the beach on their first day
They eat a lavish dinner cooked by Arakawa
Arakawa cooks a lavish dinner
They explore the woods
They are trapped inside by a storm on the second day
Kyon notes the weather forecast said nothing about a storm the day before
Kyon indicates Haruhi subconsciously created the storm to establish a closed circle
The guests play games indoors while waiting for the storm to pass
Yutaka is missing the next morning
Keiichi isn't answering the phone in his room
Koizumi, Kyon, and Arakawa ram open the door to Keiichi's room
Koizumi, Kyon, and Arakawa find Keiichi lying dead with a knife stabbed into his chest
The TV series significantly departs from the light novels in the "Remote Island Syndrome" story arc
The premise of the story and the facts of the murder mystery remain unchanged
The mystery is reworked to give Haruhi and Kyon more active roles
Numerous scenes are added
The original novelette begins with the discovery of the murder, roughly 2/3 of the way into the text
The TV episode begins with the SOS Brigade on the boat headed to the island
Kyon's sister joins the trip to the island in the episode
Kyon finds his sister in his bag
The sequences in which the SOS Brigade drink wine are omitted
Kyon, Haruhi, and Mikuru get hangovers (omitted)
Kyon, Haruhi, and Mikuru get hangovers (omitted)
Kyon, Haruhi, and Mikuru get hangovers (omitted)
The Old Maid scene is considerably expanded
Kyon is the loser in the Old Maid game instead of Koizumi
Scenes are added with the SOS Brigade lighting fireworks
Scenes are added with the SOS Brigade exploring the island
Scenes are added with the SOS Brigade playing "Truth or Dare?"
Scenes are added with the SOS Brigade having a pillow fight
Haruhi creates a typhoon to fulfill her wish for an isolated location

Remote Island Syndrome Part 2.action: Haruhi starts to examine the villa owner, Keiichi Tamaru
Arakawa tells Haruhi that Keiichi shouldn't be moved and that he is dead
Koizumi notes this is a classic locked room mystery, with only Keiichi present
Kyon realizes the unlikelihood of this scenario
Kyon suspects it was caused by Haruhi wishing for something like this to happen
The SOS Brigade put Kyon's Sister and the distraught Mikuru Asahina in a locked room under Nagato's protection
The SOS Brigade tell Kyon's Sister that Keiichi is sick
Haruhi and Kyon attempt to solve the mystery
Asahina saw Yutaka Tamaru, Keiichi's younger brother, arguing with Keiichi on their first day on the island
Haruhi overheard Yutaka making arrangements for a passport and traveler's checks on their second day
Haruhi suspects Yutaka planned to murder Keiichi and escape overseas
The maid Sonou Mori saw Yutaka take the boat out at 1 a.m.
Haruhi and Kyon head outside during the storm to confirm the boat is gone
Haruhi sees someone and pursues him along a cliffside with Kyon
Haruhi and Kyon slip and fall to a ledge with no way back to the villa
Haruhi and Kyon dry off inside a cave
Haruhi tells Kyon that Keiichi was warm when she touched him, contradicting the theory that Yutaka killed him and fled at 1 a.m.
Haruhi reasons that it also makes no sense that Keiichi was killed shortly before they found him, since the guests were all awake and someone would have heard something
Haruhi deduces that Yutaka injured Keiichi in a fight and fled, but Keiichi only died the next morning when he stumbled to his feet and fell on the knife, driving it the rest of the way in
Kyon points out that if this were the case, they would have found Keiichi lying face down, when in fact he was face up
Haruhi comes to a startling conclusion, but tells Kyon her idea doesn't make sense
Koizumi rescues Haruhi and Kyon from the cave
Kyon's sister notices someone has already eaten their dinner plate
Mori says it was Arakawa who ate the dinner plate
Haruhi says she is giving up her investigation and doesn't have what it takes to be a detective
Kyon, troubled by Haruhi's change of heart, consults Koizumi

Koizumi suspects Haruhi concluded that the knife was shoved into Keiichi when they rammed open the door, and that she is keeping quiet so Kyon and Koizumi will not have the burden of having killed someone
Kyon proposes that he kill Koizumi to keep anyone else from knowing the truth
Haruhi and Kyon deduce that Keiichi was never murdered after noticing the dinner plate with a knife and fork
Haruhi and Kyon realize only Keiichi used these utensils at the villa
Haruhi and Kyon deduce there would have been blood and scratches on the door if Keiichi were killed by it being rammed open
Koizumi greets Arakawa in a familiar manner
Arakawa mentions he has only been working for the Tamarus for a week
Haruhi and Kyon suspect Koizumi, Arakawa, Mori, and Yutaka are all in on it
Haruhi and Kyon reveal their deductions to everyone with a dramatic fake murder (Koizumi as the victim) and a dining room exposition
Kyon praises Haruhi’s detective skills
Haruhi is immensely pleased
Koizumi confides to Kyon that the whole murder plot was devised by The Agency to entertain Haruhi and prevent a real murder
Kyon becomes convinced that Haruhi would never wish for someone to be murdered
Koizumi denies knowing about the person Kyon and Haruhi saw near the cave
Koizumi fears Haruhi may have created a being to assume responsibility for killing Keiichi when she thought Kyon and Koizumi had killed him
The TV series significantly departs from the light novels in the "Remote Island Syndrome" story arc
The premise of the story and the facts of the murder mystery remain unchanged
The mystery is reworked to give Haruhi and Kyon more active roles
In the original novelette, most of the deductions are made by Koizumi
Koizumi sets up the whole scenario to give Haruhi an opportunity to play detective
Koizumi provides the key evidence of Keiichi's body temperature
Haruhi touches Keiichi and realizes his body was warm at the time of discovery
Haruhi confirms the cruiser is gone
Haruhi spots a shadowy figure
Haruhi pursues the shadowy figure
Haruhi and Kyon fall onto a cliff ledge
Haruhi and Kyon take shelter in a cave
Haruhi and Kyon deduce the first and second false solutions together
Haruhi and Kyon deduce the first and second false solutions together
Haruhi and Kyon return to the house
Haruhi and Kyon return to the house
Haruhi and Kyon figure out the true solution
Haruhi and Kyon figure out the true solution
Haruhi and Kyon set up a scene to catch out Keiichi
Haruhi and Kyon set up a scene to catch out Keiichi
Mikuru spots Keiichi and Yutaka arguing
Kyon and his sister find the remains of Keiichi's meal
No motive for Yutaka committing murder is provided in the novelette
It is mentioned that Keiichi ate with a fork and knife, but it never develops into a piece of evidence
It is warm inside the island's cave
Kyon hypothesizes that the warmth is due to heat from the Earth or a nearby hot spring
Kyon suspects that the warmth may be caused by Haruhi's powers, since it is too convenient that the cave Haruhi wanted to use is warm
Koizumi denies responsibility for the mysterious figure Haruhi and Kyon saw by the cave
Everyone else on the island is confirmed to have been in the villa when Haruhi and Kyon left
It is suggested that someone from an opposing faction was spying on Haruhi
It is suggested that Haruhi created the mysterious person herself

Endless Eight I.action: Haruhi plans many exciting activities for the brigade to execute
Kyon questions whether Haruhi has left herself enough time to do her summer homework
Haruhi informs Kyon that she finished all her homework in July so she could enjoy the rest of summer vacation freely
Kyon attempts to finish his homework
Kyon gives up partway through his homework
The TV series stretches the story out to eight episodes, each covering one complete iteration
Kyon narrates each episode as though unaware of the time loop
Koizumi informs Kyon about the time loop
Nagato remembers older iterations of the summer
The TV series extends the summer activities, introducing scenes not in the original short story
The TV series adds summer blockbuster movie, seashore, bowling, and karaoke scenes
The TV series eliminates the sequence where Kyon and Haruhi discuss getting kimonos for him and Koizumi
"Endless Eight I" recounts one of the first 8,768 iterations of the two weeks
Kyon has no feelings of deja vu
Koizumi has no feelings of deja vu
The brigade does not learn about the time loop
Haruhi hears Kyon's unspoken complaint about having to pay the restaurant bill

Endless Eight II.action: Haruhi drags the SOS Brigade around to do various activities
Haruhi takes the group swimming in the pool
Haruhi takes the group to an O-bon festival
Haruhi has the group play with fireworks
Haruhi has the group go cicada hunting
Kyon is plagued by a sense of déjà vu
Koizumi is plagued by a sense of déjà vu
Asahina calls Kyon in a panicked state
Kyon meets up with Asahina, Nagato, and Koizumi
They discover they have been experiencing an endless loop of events from August 17 to August 31
When August 31 arrives, time resets, along with everyone's memories
Haruhi subconsciously causes the time loop because she does not want summer to end
Those close to Haruhi experience faded pieces of their reset memories as déjà vu
The rest of humanity, including Haruhi, are completely unaware of the time loop
Nagato retains memories of every iteration of the time loop due to her link to the Data Integration Thought Entity
Nagato reveals this is the 15,498th time they have looped, with minor variations each time
Kyon worries about what it was like for Nagato to experience this while remembering everything
Kyon asks Nagato why she didn't say something sooner
Nagato says her duty is to simply observe
Haruhi closes up the summer activities
Kyon suffers an intense moment of déjà vu
Kyon can't think of what Haruhi could possibly want
Haruhi leaves
Kyon says nothing
On August 31, Kyon still has not done his homework
Kyon decides against doing his homework
Kyon leaves his homework as a problem to be answered either tomorrow or the next time loop
Haruhi causes time to reset two weeks, removing all future beyond those two weeks
Other members of the SOS Brigade experience remnants of memories from earlier versions of the summer as déjà vu
The Data Integration Thought Entity and the data organisms recall everything from the earlier versions of the summer

Endless Eight III.action: Haruhi drags the SOS Brigade around to do various summer vacation activities
Haruhi takes the group swimming in a pool
Haruhi takes the group to an O-bon festival
Haruhi has the group play with fireworks
Haruhi has the group go bug hunting for the 15,499th time
Kyon is plagued by an increasing sense of déjà vu as the activities continue
Asahina calls Kyon in a panicked state, asking him to meet her
Kyon meets up with Asahina, Nagato, and Koizumi
Nagato and Koizumi explain that the world has been experiencing an endless time loop from August 17 to August 31 because Haruhi feels she still has things she must do during summer vacation

Haruhi closes up the summer activities
Kyon suffers a more intense moment of déjà vu

Kyon leaves his summer homework unfinished
Haruhi causes time to reset two weeks, removing all future beyond those two weeks

The Data Integration Thought Entity and the data organisms recall everything from the earlier versions of the summer

Kyon had to suggest the study group activity
Kyon feels like the whole repeating summer adventure didn't really happen

The Sigh of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 1.action: The SOS Brigade enters the inter-club relay event at North High's field day
Haruhi makes the Brigade members wear unusual costumes with headbands and banners strapped to their backs
The costumes increase the Brigade's reputation as the school weirdos
Nagato runs her lap at superhuman speed
The SOS Brigade easily wins the relay
North High School prepares for the annual school cultural festival
Haruhi is displeased with the class decision on a questionnaire and with a film she saw the previous night
Haruhi commits the club to making an independent film
Haruhi casts Asahina and Koizumi as the leads in the film
Haruhi fends off a continuous stream of objections from Kyon
Kyon objects to the film project
Kyon inwardly admits to an interest in seeing what sort of film Haruhi will make
Haruhi uses the Literary Club's funds for the film's budget
Haruhi negotiates with shop owners for free equipment
Haruhi obtains an expensive camcorder and an airsoft gun
Haruhi brings along Kyon to carry the items
Haruhi brings along Asahina to show the owners the film's star

The Sigh of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 2.action: Kyon worries about the SOS Brigade's film-making endeavor
Kyon is concerned that Asahina may be harmed by Haruhi's designs
Kyon does not trust Haruhi's statement that she obtained their camera and airsoft guns with no strings attached
Haruhi distributes the casting list for the SOS Brigade's short film, with roles matching the members' actual nature
Koizumi expresses confidence that there is nothing to worry about and that Haruhi understands the difference between fiction and reality
Haruhi forces Asahina into a waitress uniform as her costume for the film
Nagato shows up to the meeting in her costume for her class's fortune-telling project
Haruhi decides Nagato's costume is perfectly suited for her role and modifies the role from evil alien to evil alien witch
Taniguchi and Kunikida discuss the Cultural Festival and lament the lack of a class leader after Ryouko Asakura's departure
Taniguchi and Kunikida note that no one has come up with an interesting festival project
Taniguchi and Kunikida prod Kyon for information about the SOS Brigade's plans
Kyon is evasive about the SOS Brigade's activities
Taniguchi claims he now believes Kyon and Nagato were on the floor because Haruhi directed them as a prank on him
Kyon feels relieved by Taniguchi's conclusion
The club shoots two commercials advertising their sponsors on the first day of filming
The club films several scenes in a park on Saturday
Kyon realizes Haruhi obtained the camera and guns by promising the commercials
Koizumi confesses to Kyon that he is having trouble remembering his lines for his class's theater project
Koizumi expresses desire to trade the male lead role in the SOS Brigade film to Kyon, but is too afraid of Haruhi to request this
Kyon relentlessly criticizes Haruhi's directorial decisions, especially her lack of a written script and plan to fix the plot in editing
Asahina is uncomfortable with how revealing her costume is
Haruhi constantly exhorts Asahina to show more confidence
Haruhi remains in an unshakeable good mood and enjoys the filming despite the discontent
Haruhi casts roles for Nagato, Koizumi, and Asahina
Haruhi demonstrates intuitive knowledge of Nagato, Koizumi, and Asahina's true natures

The Sigh of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 3.action: SOS Brigade films a shot of Nagato felling Asahina with magic
Kyon signals Nagato not to use actual magic (data manipulation) on Asahina
Nagato waves her wand instead of using actual magic
Haruhi is disappointed and orders Kyon to add a CG effect for Nagato's spell in post-production
They try to shoot a scene of Asahina running heroically through a flock of white pigeons
The pigeons at the nearby shrine are grey
Asahina cowers on the ground when Haruhi fires the prop guns to make the pigeons fly towards her
Haruhi fires the prop guns to make the pigeons fly towards Asahina
The SOS Brigade are chased off the shrine grounds by a priest, preventing a second take
Kyon fears the priest will recognize Koizumi's North High uniform and report them to the school
Koizumi wears his North High uniform as his costume
Haruhi is unworried, pointing out the North High uniform is not distinctive enough to identify at a glance
Haruhi reveals her concept for the film is for the timid Asahina to go through great struggles and suffering to make the happy ending more satisfying
Koizumi asks if there will be any actors in the film other than Asahina, Nagato, and himself
Haruhi is inspired to recruit people to play Nagato's minions
Haruhi insists on a tight filming schedule, including working on Saturday and Sunday
Haruhi becomes displeased with the battle sequence
Haruhi conjures the idea of Asahina shooting laser beams from the blue contact lens on her left eye
Asahina actually fires deadly beams during filming of the scene
Nagato protects Kyon and tackles Asahina to remove the contact lens
Nagato hides the contact lens from Haruhi
Haruhi adapts the film's plot to account for Asahina not having the contact lens in every scene
SOS Brigade works until showdown, finishing Saturday's filming
SOS Brigade shoots footage of Asahina's everyday life in the park and downtown area
Asahina wears her "normal" clothes of a bunnygirl outfit
Koizumi recognizes that Haruhi's wish for a laser beam caused the earlier incident
Koizumi brings Nagato to Asahina's house at night
Nagato injects nanomachines to counter the effect on Asahina
Asahina is distraught over the incident and calls in sick Sunday morning
Haruhi is not fooled and goes to Asahina's house to drag her to the meeting place
Haruhi adds Tsuruya, Taniguchi, and Kunikida as extras in the film
Kyon lures Taniguchi and Kunikida with the promise of seeing Asahina in a waitress costume
Haruhi declares that they will be shooting at a lake near Koizumi's house
Haruhi wishes for a "Mikuru Beam"
Asahina's contact lens fires photon beams
Nagato moves at superhuman speed
Nagato projects an invisible shield around Kyon's body to protect him
Nagato bites Asahina to inject nanomachines
nanomachines prevent further photon beams from being produced by Asahina's body
Haruhi hears Kyon's unspoken complaint about having to work on the movie on Sunday

The Sigh of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 4.action: The SOS Brigade continue their movie-making endeavor and proceed to a pond blocked off by a chain-link fence
Nagato pries the fence open
The film's extras (Tsuruya, Taniguchi, and Kunikida) write off Nagato's superhuman feat by assuming the fence was old
The group films Asahina and Nagato's characters taunting each other
Haruhi gives Asahina a new contact lens
Nagato jumps on Asahina and gets rid of the lens
The contact lens cuts a V-shape into the chain-link fence
Haruhi explains they are filming a scene where Nagato takes control of innocent bystanders and has them throw Asahina into the pond
three extras play the innocent bystanders
Asahina is mortified at the prospect of being thrown into the polluted pond
Asahina agrees to do the scene to avoid provoking Haruhi into remaking the world
SOS Brigade mutually decides to continue filming to avoid provoking Haruhi
Koizumi helps Asahina out of the pond afterwards
Haruhi declares the next scene will be Koizumi bringing Asahina back to his home
Haruhi brushes off Kyon’s objection about the movie’s plot inconsistency
Kyon comes to the conclusion that Haruhi devised the pond scene just to humiliate Asahina
Tsuruya volunteers her house as a filming location for the love scene
Haruhi dismisses the other two extras
Haruhi, Kyon, Koizumi, Asahina, and Tsuruya head over to Tsuruya's huge house
Haruhi dresses Asahina in a revealing nightgown
Haruhi spikes Asahina's drink with alcohol to make her come off more "sexy"
Haruhi orders Koizumi to kiss Asahina for the scene
Kyon begins arguing with Haruhi
Kyon realizes Haruhi spiked Asahina's drink
The argument escalates, with Haruhi declaring Asahina is merely her "toy" and everything is hers to control
Kyon tries to hit Haruhi
Koizumi restrains Kyon
Koizumi informs Kyon that Haruhi is so depressed by their falling out that no Shinjins appeared in response to his defying her
Koizumi explains that Haruhi cannot even feel frustrated
Koizumi shows Kyon that all the pigeons in the shrine have turned white, in response to Haruhi's earlier wish
Kyon maintains that he cannot forgive Haruhi for her mistreatment of Asahina
Taniguchi derides Haruhi's movie at lunch, feeling sore after being dismissed
Kyon becomes angered by Taniguchi's comments
Kyon realizes he also constantly criticized the movie despite not contributing ideas for the cultural festival
Kyon acknowledges he was willing to help Haruhi every step of the way
Kyon is moved to go to the clubroom and tell Haruhi they should finish the movie
Haruhi is reinvigorated by her reconciliation with Kyon
Haruhi makes cherry blossoms bloom in the midst of autumn
Haruhi decides to get a cat to be a familiar for Nagato's character
Nagato tears open a chain-link fence
Haruhi gives Asahina's contact lens the ability to project a high frequency molecular cutter
Haruhi wishes for white pigeons
The pigeons' feathers turn white
Haruhi causes cherry blossoms to bloom out of season

The Sigh of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 5.action: Nagato takes the SOS Brigade to a garden behind her house where stray cats gather
Haruhi picks a male calico and names him Shamisen
Haruhi entrusts Shamisen's care to Kyon
Haruhi remarks that, as Nagato's familiar, Shamisen should talk
Haruhi leaves
Shamisen begins to talk to Kyon
Koizumi infers that Haruhi is subconsciously confusing the fantasy of the film with reality
Koizumi explains that Haruhi's power boost will change their everyday reality unless they get her to see the film world as fiction
Kyon instructs Shamisen not to talk in the house
Shamisen complies with Kyon's instruction
Asahina approaches Kyon between classes to give him a coupon for the yakisoba cafe her class is running
Asahina privately tells Kyon that she disbelieves Koizumi's claim about Haruhi's power
Asahina asserts that there have always been aliens, espers, time travelers, and talking cats, and Haruhi can intuitively find them
Asahina repeatedly emphasizes she is not speaking out of enmity towards Koizumi
Kyon tells Asahina he believes her theory is the correct one
Kyon privately consults Nagato about the matter
Nagato says there is no way of proving which theory is true
Nagato explains that neither Koizumi nor Asahina can accept the other's theory because it negates their own existence
Nagato refuses to tell which theory she herself subscribes to
Koizumi confronts Kyon privately after school
Koizumi tells Kyon that various paranormal factions are constantly at war behind the scenes
Koizumi tells Kyon that Asahina joined the SOS Brigade and behaves pitiably hapless against Haruhi to manipulate Kyon, and through him, Haruhi
Kyon reacts with anger
Koizumi backs off from his claim
Haruhi continues to be enthusiastic about the filming
Asahina's prop guns fire water bullets
cherry blossoms fall
white pigeons turn into formerly extinct passenger pigeons
Kyon persuades Haruhi to record a voice over disclaimer that the events of the film are purely fictional during the credits
Haruhi records a voice over disclaimer
Kyon concludes that his idea worked when Shamisen stops talking
The editing of the film is left for the day before the Cultural Festival
Kyon and Haruhi stay at the school overnight to get the editing done
Kyon and Haruhi stay at the school overnight to get the editing done
Kyon and Haruhi both fall asleep
Kyon and Haruhi both fall asleep
Kyon and Haruhi awake to find the editing mysteriously complete, visual effects and all
Kyon and Haruhi awake to find the editing mysteriously complete, visual effects and all
Haruhi assumes Kyon did the editing and praises his work
The SOS Brigade watch the film together in private
The SOS Brigade screen the film at the Cultural Festival
Kyon meets Haruhi at a cafe
Kyon tells Haruhi that Nagato is an alien, Asahina a time traveler, and Koizumi an esper
Haruhi doesn't believe Kyon
Haruhi storms out
Haruhi gives Shamisen the ability to talk
Haruhi makes Asahina's contact lens fire blades
Haruhi causes the prop guns to fire water bullets
Haruhi turns white pigeons into passenger pigeons
People from a medieval fantasy world appear at the Cultural Festival
The film's editing is mysteriously completed overnight, most likely by Haruhi's powers
Kyon suggests that Nagato or Koizumi most likely did the editing
Kyon awakes with his face resting on the computer keyboard
Nagato and Koizumi are ruled out as editors because they could not have done the editing without moving Kyon's face, and would have no reason to put it back

The Boredom of Haruhi Suzumiya (anime).action: Haruhi enters the SOS Brigade in a baseball tournament
Haruhi reasons that winning the tournament will create good publicity
Kyon believes Haruhi is motivated by boredom
The rest of the Brigade are unenthusiastic but go along for fear Haruhi will get upset or start more searches for supernatural beings
The rest of the Brigade are unenthusiastic but go along for fear Haruhi will get upset or start more searches for supernatural beings
The rest of the Brigade are unenthusiastic but go along for fear Haruhi will get upset or start more searches for supernatural beings
They practise catching grounders on the school's sports ground
Kyon and Asahina invite Taniguchi, Kunikida, Tsuruya, and Kyon's sister to fill the remaining baseball team slots
Kyon chooses his ten-year-old sister in hopes of preventing the SOS Brigade from winning
Haruhi is exceptionally good as both a batter and pitcher
The rest of the team perform poorly
Haruhi changes Asahina and herself into cheerleader outfits to distract the opposition
Haruhi is still the only one able to get on base
Koizumi tells Kyon that a massive closed space has formed
Koizumi attributes the closed space to Haruhi's disappointment at Kyon's performance
Koizumi believes it is not coincidence that Kyon drew clean-up batter, despite the batting order being chosen by lottery
Kyon makes a dash into the outfield to catch a fly ball and prevent the mercy rule from being triggered
Koizumi directs Nagato to change their baseball bat so it always hits the ball to the same location outside the field
Nagato alters the bat, resulting in 11 home runs
Nagato takes position as catcher for the final round
Nagato causes every ball Kyon pitches to move erratically
Kyon pitches the balls
The Pirates all strike out
SOS Brigade wins the first round, clearing up the closed space
Kyon petitions Haruhi to forfeit so the Pirates don’t lose their chance at the tournament
Haruhi is unwilling to forfeit at first
Haruhi agrees to forfeit after realizing Kyon enjoyed the game
Haruhi makes Kyon buy the entire team lunch
Kyon buys the team lunch
The Pirates buy Kyon’s baseball bat, believing it to be magical
Kyon ends up with a net profit
Nagato applies "homing mode" to a baseball bat to hit only home runs
Nagato modifies the trajectories of a ball using data manipulation
Koizumi says that a closed space has been created
Koizumi hypothesizes that the outcome of the batting order lottery was manipulated by Haruhi's powers

Bamboo Leaf Rhapsody (anime).action: Haruhi decides the SOS Brigade should celebrate Tanabata
The members write their wishes down on tanzaku
The members hang the tanzaku on a bamboo tree
Haruhi explains that Orihime and Hikoboshi are represented by the stars Vega and Altair
Haruhi points out that because Vega and Altair are 25 and 16 light years from Earth, their wishes will take 25 and 16 years to be granted
Nagato leaves a tanzaku with Kyon
Asahina leaves a tanzaku with Kyon
Asahina’s tanzaku asks Kyon to stay with her after everyone leaves
Asahina asks Kyon to travel back in time with her
Kyon and Asahina travel back in time to a park, exactly three years ago
Asahina falls unconscious
Adult Asahina tells Kyon to carry the unconscious Asahina and assist a person at the school nearby
Kyon carries unconscious Asahina with him
Kyon assists a person at the school nearby
The person proves to be young Haruhi, who is breaking into her school
Haruhi orders Kyon to draw symbols on the school grounds with a line marker
Kyon draws symbols on the school grounds with a line marker
Kyon realizes the symbols are the quad scribbles Taniguchi told him about
Haruhi asks Kyon whether he thinks aliens, time travelers, espers, and sliders exist
Kyon answers affirmatively, except for sliders
Kyon remains anonymous to avoid causing a paradox, giving his name as John Smith and claiming Asahina is his narcoleptic sister
Haruhi recognizes Kyon's North High uniform
Haruhi becomes further interested when Kyon mentions knowing someone like her at North High
Haruhi heads home
Kyon wakes Asahina
Asahina discovers her TPDD is missing
Kyon realizes the TPDD must have been taken by the adult Asahina
Kyon looks at Nagato's tanzaku, which has symbols Haruhi had him draw
Kyon and Asahina find the younger Nagato at her apartment
Kyon and Asahina gain entrance by introducing themselves as acquaintances of Haruhi Suzumiya
Nagato freezes time inside her bedroom until the present arrives
Kyon and Asahina return to their correct time without having to wait and age three years
Nagato tells Kyon the symbols on her tanzaku say "I am here."
Kyon is startled by Nagato's ability to translate
Kyon asks if the symbols Haruhi composed are in an alien language
Nagato does not answer Kyon's question
Asahina says she cannot answer Kyon's questions about why they helped young Haruhi
Asahina explains she is just a trainee who only became involved because Haruhi chose her for the SOS Brigade
Kyon finds Haruhi still melancholy at school the next day
Haruhi remembers the events of Tanabata from three years ago
Kyon discusses with Koizumi and Nagato the contradiction between Asahina's statement and the likelihood that his conversation with Haruhi three years ago caused her decision to attend North High
Kyon and Asahina travel back in time
Haruhi directs Kyon to draw symbols
Kyon draws symbols
Nagato understands the symbols, which are in an alien language
Nagato suspends time inside her bedroom for three years

Myst\u00e9rique Sign.action: Haruhi makes a logo for the SOS Brigade
Kyon puts the logo on the SOS Brigade website
The entire site becomes malformed as a result
Reuploading fails to correct the issue
Kyon puts up posters all over the school advertising counseling services
SOS Brigade receives its first client, Emiri Kimidori
Emiri Kimidori asks the SOS Brigade to investigate the disappearance of her boyfriend, the Computer Research Society's president
Haruhi rebukes Kyon for putting up the posters without her permission
Kyon realizes Haruhi is excited about the SOS Brigade being an all-purpose advisory and investigative service
They arrive at the Computer Club President's apartment and find no one there
Haruhi gets bored and leaves
Nagato and Koizumi tell the rest to stay as they detect a strange presence
Nagato takes Kyon, Asahina, and Koizumi to a separate data space
A data lifeform shaped like a giant cave cricket appears
Nagato and Koizumi defeat the data lifeform
Koizumi uses a small amount of his power
Nagato and Koizumi rescue the president of the Computer Club
Nagato tells the group that the lifeform came to Earth 280 million years ago and went into hibernation until Haruhi's logo appeared on the internet
The lifeform spreads hyperlinks to the SOS Brigade website, resulting in over 29,000 hits
Eight people, including the Computer Club president, view the true logo and become hosts for the lifeform
Nagato modifies Haruhi's logo to remove the danger
The Computer Club president tells Kyon he doesn't have a girlfriend
Kyon suspects Kimidori was a pretend client set up by Nagato to alleviate Haruhi's boredom, or perhaps Nagato's own boredom
Haruhi draws a simple image
The image contains approximately 436 petabytes of data
The SOS Brigade enters a data space separate from the normal physical world
The SOS Brigade confronts a data lifeform
Nagato uses data manipulation
Koizumi uses esper powers, possible because the space was created using data from Haruhi
The data lifeform had been in hibernation for 280 million years, longer than is possible for any real world organism
Koizumi reveals that the SOS Brigade clubroom is saturated with supernatural forces

The Adventures of Mikuru Asahina Episode.action: The opening theme, Koi no Mikuru Densetsu, is used in this episode
Koi no Mikuru Densetsu is unique to this episode
The SOS Brigade previews their movie of questionable quality, directed by Haruhi Suzumiya
Mikuru Asahina stars as a time-traveling waitress from the future sent to protect a young man
Itsuki Koizumi plays the young man who is unaware he has great esper powers
In her civilian identity, Mikuru works as a hawker for local produce shops
Mikuru engages in fights with an alien-magician, played by Yuki Nagato, who wants Itsuki's powers
Yuki Nagato uses her magic to take control of Mikuru's friend Tsuruya and two other innocent people (played by Kunikida and Taniguchi)
Tsuruya, Kunikida, and Taniguchi (under Yuki's control) throw Mikuru into a lake
Itsuki pulls Mikuru out of the lake and takes her back to his home after she faints
Itsuki and Mikuru become romantically involved, and Mikuru moves in with him
Yuki tries to persuade Itsuki to ally with her
A love triangle ensues with both Mikuru and Yuki transferring into Itsuki's school and striving for his affections
Yuki challenges Mikuru to a final battle and defeats her
Itsuki intervenes when Yuki tries to seize his power
Itsuki's esper abilities awaken and he uses them to blast Yuki into outer space
The film ends with Yuki and Itsuki resuming their romance
Kyon provides narration throughout the film
Kyon explains the film's story through audio commentary
Haruhi creates a haphazard plot for the film
Kyon edits the film, leaving in a number of bloopers
Haruhi yells "Cut!" during filming
Kyon sometimes comments on a scene as it is being filmed
The completed film is screened
Kyon is horrified at the film's amateur quality
Haruhi is enthusiastic about the film
Haruhi begins talking of doing a sequel
Shamisen talks during the movie's final scene

Live Alive.action: Haruhi handles promotion for the SOS Brigade's film by herself
Kyon, Taniguchi, and Kunikida browse the attractions in their school's Cultural Festival
Asahina and Tsuruya's class runs a yakisoba stall
The yakisoba stall draws in a large number of male patrons due to Tsuruya's appearance in a waitress outfit
Kyon peeks in on Koizumi's class play
Kyon peeks in on Nagato's fortune telling booth
Kyon is disinterested in both the play and the fortune telling booth
Kyon, weary from editing the SOS Brigade's film all night, goes to the music concerts in hopes of getting some rest
Kyon becomes sleepy
Kyon wakes up when he sees ENOZ walking onto the stage with Haruhi and Nagato among them
ENOZ walks onto the stage with Haruhi and Nagato among them
Haruhi informs the crowd that Miyuki Enomoto and Takako Nakanishi could not be present, and that she and Nagato are acting as stand-ins
ENOZ performs on stage
The audience, including Koizumi and Kyon, enthusiastically receives ENOZ's performance
Koizumi enthusiastically receives the performance
Kyon begrudgingly receives the performance
Haruhi tells the full story to Kyon in class the next morning
Haruhi explains that Enomoto had amigdalitis and Nakanishi sprained her wrist and were forced not to play
Haruhi feels compassion for the band members who practiced hard for the performance
Haruhi volunteers herself and Nagato to replace Enomoto and Nakanishi
Nagato replaces one of the band members in the performance
The actual band members come by to thank Haruhi
The band members say that thanks to Haruhi and Nagato's performance, numerous requests have been coming in for their song recordings
Haruhi is uncomfortable with being thanked
Haruhi requires Kyon to stand with her while she talks to the band members
Haruhi runs off when lunch break arrives
Kyon eats lunch
Kyon goes looking for Haruhi
Kyon finds Haruhi lying pensively in the quad
Haruhi tells Kyon she felt she was doing something meaningful during the band's performance and has felt restless ever since
Kyon believes Haruhi is rethinking her life due to the new experience of helping people
Haruhi reveals she just wants to start her own rock band for next year's Cultural Festival and make a sequel to their movie
There aren't many people in the auditorium before ENOZ's performance
It starts to rain
Most of the students outside seek shelter in the gym
Haruhi notes to Kyon that she had hoped lots of people would show up for the band's sake
Haruhi suggests the possibility that her power changed the weather
Nagato learns how to proficiently play guitar in a moment
It is unclear whether Haruhi wishes for Nagato to be able to fill in with ENOZ
It is unclear whether Nagato applies her data manipulation abilities

The Day of Sagittarius.action: The Computer Research Society becomes anxious to get their computer back from Haruhi
Several days after the Cultural Festival, the Computer Research Society challenges the SOS Brigade to a 5v5 match on "The Day of Sagittarius III"
The Computer Research Society puts four laptop computers on the line
The Computer Research Society gives the SOS Brigade a week to learn the game
Haruhi is already sure of victory
Haruhi offers to add Nagato or Asahina to the wager
Kyon tells Koizumi and Nagato to play the game without "cheating" (using supernatural powers), regardless of Haruhi's reaction
Koizumi observes an unspoken bond of trust between Kyon and Haruhi
Haruhi is confident she cannot lose with Kyon at her side and is willing to bet Brigade members on the outcome
Kyon is willing to risk the SOS Brigade losing because he is confident Haruhi will not create closed space if they do
Asahina is hopelessly unable to grasp the video game's basics
Nagato does not know how to use a mouse due to spending most of her life reading
Haruhi keeps charging ahead of the other fleets, causing early losses because her craft is the flagship
Kyon convinces Haruhi to not charge ahead
Computer Club ships repeatedly hit the SOS Brigade's flanks and withdraw before retaliation
Nagato processes data at high speed and splits her fleet into 20 squadrons, sewing confusion in their enemies
SOS Brigade remains at a disadvantage
Nagato tells Kyon that the Computer Research Society is cheating by disabling the fog of war
Kyon allows Nagato to hack the game and activate the fog of war
Nagato hacks the game to activate the fog of war, blinding the Computer Research Society
Computer Research Society is blinded and cannot scout due to their cheating
SOS Brigade wins the game
Computer Research Society President is awestruck by Nagato's hacking abilities
Computer Research Society President invites Nagato to spend time with the Computer Research Society whenever she is free
Haruhi objects to the invitation
Kyon realizes that Nagato enjoys playing with computers
Kyon tells Nagato to visit the Computer Research Society when she feels like it
Nagato controls 20 squadrons of battleships individually
The feat is described as impossible for humans due to the amount of information that must be kept track of simultaneously

Someday in the Rain.action: "Someday in the Rain" is broadcast as episode 9 of season 1
"Someday in the Rain" functions as the season 2 finale in the in-universe chronology
"Someday in the Rain" is not based on any story from the light novels, making it the only original episode of the anime
"Someday in the Rain" stands out as the only episode which is not from Kyon's perspective
Haruhi orders Kyon to pick up a heater from electronics shop owner Jirou Oomurei
Kyon objects to the errand
Kyon ultimately agrees to pick up the heater, admitting it is a reasonable request
Asahina lends Kyon her scarf
Kyon heads out to get the heater
Haruhi takes the opportunity to take pictures of Asahina in various costumes for the movie's DVD cover and extras
Koizumi holds the reflector board for the photoshoot
Nagato is left alone to read
Haruhi, Asahina, and Koizumi move on to the gym for more photos
Kyon picks up the heater
Oomurei mentions to Kyon that he considers the heater an advance payment for the movie's sequel
Kyon realizes Haruhi got the free heater in exchange for another commercial in the sequel
Kyon returns and bumps into Tsuruya
Tsuruya sees Kyon wearing Asahina's scarf and incorrectly concludes he was running the errand for Asahina
Kyon finds only Nagato in the club room
Kyon asks Nagato where the others are
Nagato does not answer Kyon's question
Nagato directed Tsuruya to the others' location
Kyon sets up the heater
Kyon falls asleep waiting for the others
Haruhi puts her cardigan on Kyon to keep him warm
Kyon is woken by Haruhi
Haruhi is mortified at being caught
Kyon notices there are two cardigans on him and wonders who the second belongs to
Haruhi is in a good mood as she and Kyon share an umbrella on the walk home through the rain
Kyon and Haruhi share an umbrella on the walk home through the rain
